devOrgs.description: Orgs builders can pull changes from (any sandbox/scratch/dev org)

org.description: Org key — prefixes the repo-level auth secrets (<KEY>_SF_AUTH_URL / <KEY>_SF_CLIENT_ID…)

authMethod.description: How CI authenticates to this stage's org (see .github/actions/sf-auth)

testLevel.description: Apex test level for validation/deploy; Conditional = NoTestRun unless the delta contains Apex

branch.description: Long-lived Git branch mapped to this stage

org.description: Logical org key (matches the secret set / CLI alias, e.g. INT, UAT, PROD)

environment.description: GitHub Environment name guarding deploys to this stage

scannerMaxSeverity.description: Scanner findings at this severity or more severe (lower number) block promotion

minCoverage.description: Minimum Apex test coverage percentage required to promote

requiredReviewers.description: Whether the GitHub Environment enforces required reviewers (informational; enforced in GitHub settings)

workItemStatus.description: Post-PoC: allowed tracker statuses for attached work items
